description_long: This is a simple, blocky wooden stool with a square top and four straight legs. The surface of the stool is flat and broad, featuring a wood grain texture with a mix of light and dark brown tones. The legs are positioned at the corners, providing stable support, and are slightly tapered. There are no visible decorative elements, backrest, or footrest, giving the stool a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The construction appears solid, likely made from a single type of wood, and the finish is matte with a subtle texture. This stool would be suitable for use in urban parks, public spaces, or outdoor seating areas.
description: A square, wooden stool with a flat top and four straight, corner legs, finished in a matte wood grain texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid square top and two legs, with the other two legs obscured.
description_view_1: Side view revealing all four legs and the full width of the flat top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the square top and two visible legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing all four legs and the flat top surface.
